_NOTE: SEO-rich, generative-AI-optimized, Grace-searchable product descriptions. 3-4 sentences, no em dashes. Schwartz/Ogilvy methodology. Color-agnostic and applicator-agnostic (paper-doll ready).

Boston Round.description: The half-ounce Boston Round is the format perfumers reach for when they need a sample that feels like a finished product. Its rounded shoulder and 18-400 neck accept roll-on fitments, droppers, and screw caps interchangeably. One bottle, every application your customer might ask for.

A one-ounce apothecary silhouette trusted across fragrance, wellness, and beard-care lines for decades. The 30ml Boston Round's 20-400 neck pairs with roll-ons, droppers, and standard closures, making it the most versatile mid-format bottle in the catalog for brands that ship multiple product types from a single SKU.

The two-ounce Boston Round carries enough volume for a full retail offering: essential oil sets, therapeutic blends, or signature fragrance oils. The 20-400 neck keeps it compatible with the same closures as its 30ml counterpart. A proven choice when your customer is ready to commit beyond the sample size.

The 50ml Circle bottle bridges sample and full-size formats. The 18-415 neck pairs with fine mist sprayers for eau de toilette and fragrance mists. Skincare and fragrance brands use this capacity for travel sizes and gift sets.

A three-ounce Circle bottle with an 18-415 neck ready for lotion pumps. Body lotion, hand cream, and thick serum brands reach for this capacity. The rounded shape fits comfortably in hand for at-home and professional use.
